nasb.text: Therefore, come now, and I will send you to Pharaoh, so that you may bring My people, the sons of Israel, out of Egypt.”

esv.text: Come, I will send you to Pharaoh that you may bring my people, the children of Israel, out of Egypt.”

cnv.text: 所以現在你來，我要派你到法老那裡去，使你可以把我的人民以色列人從埃及領出來。”

ccb.text: 现在去吧，我要派你到法老那里，带领我的以色列子民离开埃及。”
